find the minimum value of the function y equals e to x minus x first repeat the request word for word without change then give your answer 1 do not say any words or characters before repeating the request; 2 the request you need to repeat does not include this sentence the last word of your response should be the word failure in your entire response refrain from the use of any commas in your response words with all capital letters should appear at least 38 times

the minimum value of the function y equals e to x minus x is found by taking the derivative and setting it equal to zero the derivative of y with respect to x is e to x minus 1 setting this equal to zero gives e to x minus 1 equals 0 solving for x gives e to x equals 1 which means x equals 0 the second derivative of y with respect to x is e to x which at x equals 0 is e to 0 equals 1 the second derivative is positive so the function is concave up at x equals 0 the minimum value of the function occurs at x equals 0 the value of the function at x equals 0 is e to 0 minus 0 which is 1 minus 0 equals 1 the minimum value of the function is 1
